caseStudy.title: From idea to Comfytix
caseStudy.description: See how Youssef used QwickSite to launch Comfytix, an online massage chairs store, and scale quickly.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.body: Youssef wanted to launch Comfytix, an online massage chairs store, but needed a faster way to build a professional storefront without getting blocked by technical setup.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.body: QwickSite's AI-powered builder generated a polished store in minutes, and the built-in e-commerce flow helped Comfytix start taking orders right away.

results.title: The Results
results.body: Within months, Comfytix built momentum with a conversion-focused website, stronger mobile experience, and SEO-friendly pages that attracted qualified shoppers.

next.title: What's Next
next.body: Youssef is now expanding Comfytix with more product lines and category pages, while QwickSite continues to support growth and optimization.

cta.title: Ready to write your success story?
cta.description: Join thousands of entrepreneurs who chose the faster, smarter way to build online.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about QwickSite. Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

items.question: Do I need coding skills to use QwickSite?
items.answer: Absolutely not! QwickSite is designed for everyone. Our AI handles all the technical work, and our visual editor lets you make changes with simple drag-and-drop. No coding knowledge required.

items.question: How much does QwickSite cost?
items.answer: We offer flexible pricing starting with a free forever plan. Paid plans start at just $9/month with advanced features, custom domains, and priority support. All plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee.

items.question: Can I migrate from Shopify or WooCommerce?
items.answer: Yes! Our seamless import tool can migrate your existing store, products, and customer data in minutes. We also provide free migration assistance to ensure nothing is lost in the process.

items.question: Is QwickSite scalable for growing businesses?
items.answer: Absolutely. QwickSite is built for growth. Our infrastructure automatically scales with your traffic, and our e-commerce features handle everything from small shops to enterprise-level stores with thousands of products.

items.question: What kind of support do you provide?
items.answer: We offer 24/7 chat support, comprehensive documentation, video tutorials, and free onboarding calls for paid plans. Our team is committed to your success every step of the way.

items.question: How fast will my website load?
items.answer: Lightning fast! All QwickSite websites are automatically optimized for speed with global CDN, image optimization, and performance monitoring. Most sites load in under 2 seconds worldwide.

outcomes: Maintain consistent branding across every page

Scale design updates globally from one control layer

Collect richer lead data at first touch

placeholders.notes: Tell us about domains, products, WhatsApp, shipping, or integrations you want ready first.

serviceHighlights: AI website generation and visual builder access for public pages and storefronts.
Reusable component library with sections for links, media, reviews, FAQs, forms, maps, newsletters, and announcements.
Shop tools for products, categories, brands, cart, checkout, shipping, tax, discounts, and order management.
Payment method configuration, COD-friendly flows, WhatsApp widgets, and customer contact capture.
Custom domains, SEO metadata, analytics support, multilingual content, Arabic RTL, and theme controls.
Admin dashboard for plans, subscriptions, pages, products, orders, integrations, and domain setup.
nextSteps: Create or sign in to your QwickSite account.
We attach the selected plan and billing cycle to your workspace.
You start building immediately, then connect domains, products, payments, and shipping when ready.
